title: Deogarh Fort
tagline: Deogarh Fort — heritage city of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: The Deogarh Fort or Devgarh Fort is an old fort in Chhindwara district, Madhya Pradesh, India.
overview.description: The Deogarh Fort or Devgarh Fort is an old fort in Chhindwara district, Madhya Pradesh, India. It was the capital of a Gond Dynasty and is in the village of Devgarh, 42 km from the district headquarters Chhindwara and 22 km from Umranala . It spreads over a hill 650 m (2132.55 ft) high.

topPlaces.name: Deogarh, Madhya Pradesh
topPlaces.description: Deogarh, also known as Devgarh, is a village in Mohkhed tehsil of Chhindwara District of the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It is located 24 miles southwest of Chhindwara, picturesquely situated on a crest of the hills.

items.note: Deogarh, also known as Devgarh, is a village in Mohkhed tehsil of Chhindwara District of the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. It is located 24 miles southwest of Chhindwara, picturesquely situated on a crest of the hills.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Deogarh Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Deogarh Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Deogarh Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar International Airport, Nagpur (94 km) and the nearest railway station is Nagpur Junction (89 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Deogarh Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Deogarh Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Deogarh Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Deogarh Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Deogarh Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Deogarh, Madhya Pradesh.
